productDisplayName: Doodle Girl Denim skirt with belt Blue Skirts
description: Composition Dark blue denim skirt with a zippered and buttoned closure in the front, has loops on the waist, two pockets on the sides with a small pocket inside the right pocket, two pockets at the back and has a floral cotton fabric belt Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print The cute statement simply zooms high when you dress your little girl in this cute denim skirt from doodle. The floral fabric belt adds to it a colorful touch. Team this with a girly top and sandals.
